description: Evan Edrok is a High Ranker as well the Chief Guide of Zahard Royalty, which is a unique position in the Tower. He always seems to follow his partner, Ha Yuri Zahard.

name: Fal Meigis
nativeName: ファル・イース・メイギス
description: She is the crown princess of Meigis. While a knight-class man was abducting her, Al Wayne saved her, causing her to be infatuated with him. As a crown princess, Fal is a dignified beauty who puts her citizens and beloved before her. She treats everyone with equality and compassion. Nevertheless, she is a qualified future queen for her wisdom. But, while being such a person, she is unusually stubborn and does not tolerate discrimination.

name: Fumika
description: Fumika is the main character in the anime series. She appears to be a young girl, though her real age is never mentioned. She works as a mail carrier from the afterlife realm of Shigo, delivering what are known as "shigofumi" to people in a Japanese city that she has been assigned to. These shigofumi are letters written by those who have recently died, and it is Fumika's job to deliver the letters to whoever the dead wanted them to go to. name: Garam Jahad
description: She's one of the princesses of Jahad. She is known as the Hermit in the North City of the 43rd Floor and the Princess of the Deep Colored Sea, she is also the owner of Blue August and Indigo July.

name: Griamor
description: Griamor is a Holy Knight who comes from a lineage of Holy Knights that have served the kingdom of Lyonesse for many generations. He is Veronica's bodyguard, and shows absolute loyalty towards her. Griamor is a very tall and muscular individual who is at least twice the height of ordinary civilians, and has grey shoulder length hair. His attire consists of a single-spiked helmet, full leg armor and no upper body clothing, except a mysterious metal plate strapped around his chest with two straps.
